TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Pay-ney kanatal aidangan "Si-pang-ya a kamu, "Parque Nacional Torres del Paine' u imi Cin-ta aidangan nu kanatal "Paine" cusulit makay In-ti-an a kamu "sumilaway a imi, hamin u kanatal aidangan masaiyuk nu sumilaway malinganguay diheb kuli a sauwasc a singangan. :Parque Nacional Torres del Paine)ŚŹąŤ≠ĮÁāļťĚíŚ°ĒŚúčŚģ∂ŚÖ¨Śúí,"Paine" . nilaculan tini i nutimulan nu C-li cacay nu kanalalay aidangan, lalabu micapi tu An-s-san atu timul Tay-pin-yang atu sikuliay a bayu, kikasumad ku la'cus nu demiad, kanatal aidangan angangan a adihan izaw ku Pay-ney-ta "Las Torres", Pay-ney kalimucu' "Los Cuernos" Hwa-kow-ku "Valle Franc√©s", Now-ten-se-al-te kuli a taku "Lano Nordenskj√∂ld" atu taneng maazih ku kuli a byu' nu abu taku ÔľÜ abu kuli a sauwac "Lago Grey & Glacier Grey" imahini u May-ce-lun-Ce-li tinulay cudetay a kitizaan ku mikuwanay, 112 kung-li ku laed tu Na-ta-lay-s a minatu, patizeng i 1959 a mihca 5 a bulad 13 a demiad, u hekal 2,422 pin-hwng-kung-li. :ÁôĺŚÖßŚ°Ē(Las Torres),ÁôĺŚÖßŤßí(Los Cuernos),ś≥ēŚúčŤį∑(Valle Franc√©s),ŤęĺÁôĽść®ÁąĺŚĺ∑ŚÜįŚ∑ĚśĻĖ(Lago Nordenskj√∂ld) . milekakawa ku Nan-mey-cow mikinsa tu nisulitan a ngangan hawsa "Pay-ney-ye kanatal aidangan" "Parque Nacional Torres del Paine" lalid sa tahkal i nuayawan nu maku, anu caay kinsaen sa kaliyuhan, kins han sa katawidan azih han sanu Pay-ney aidangan nu singanganay nu Nan-mey-cow, salungan ku hekal u kapahay a piculilan. "(Parque Nacional Torres del Paine) . paymihcaan masulup ku malebut emang ku manamuhay tu nu tahakay a piliwkuay tayni. micidek ku manamuhay mukayakay tu buyu' sakay Ow-mey a tademaw hawsa, sakamu sa ku Pay-ne i kauzipan kanca a kinacacay tayni mizizaw u kanamuhan nu miculilay kuyni a zazan. anu "ten-kong-c-cin" "u-yu-ni" Ya-cow a tademaw tayza i Nan-mey kanca u pizunbayan a katayzan. uyza "Pay-ney kanatal aidangan" uyza nu miliwkuay nu Ow-mey kanca u pizunbanay a piidangan . uyni nisulitan amisiwkay tuu liwliw nu Pay-ney kanatal aidangan, hicaen mizunbay tu cacililan atu pilaminan. atu tayza i kanatal aidangan a saculilan atu labu singanganay aazihan nu Pay-ney kanatal aidangan sibalucu' a paazih tu kawaw nu Pay-ney kanatal aidangan. zayhan tayza Pay-ne kanatal aidangan cacay a demiad malikeluh ku balad maluyuh tu ku sangaw nupades, sisa sazikuzay nayi' ku malaheciay a Pay-ney kanatal aidanganay "W" piculilan a zazan, tayza dada' Pay-ne kanatal aidangan satipanay a "Ke-iye kuli a sauwac i capi misaculiculil. zuma mipangangan tu Pay-ne kanatal aidanganay a Day Tour makalikut mikinaul tu hekal nu Pay-ne kanatal aidanganay. Ce-li in-in apiaziha, u sakaydihan aku miazih saayaway micuzuh tu Pay-ne kanatal aidangan atu bu-he-cye kanatal. Pay-ne kanatal aidangan uyza mahica u piliwkuan nu tademaw a N a kakitiza pisingkiwan hina singanganay. kanahatu miliwku amana paceba sat u nipisingkiw tu tau, nika tadeng makazebec a katuud ku micukelay, tatenga' kikatinengan ku tau. Nutimilan nu Nan-bey Patagonia kakitizaan u sakatuluay a piliwkuan nu Nan-mey, acaay piales kaku miliwku tu Pay-ne kanatal aidangan. u dumiad ku han, maalesaytu muculil tuya micidekay nu mitaliyukay mukayakay tu buyu' a zazan "El Circuito / The Paine Circuit" tuwaca kinapina a panukas, nipangangan "W" a zazan mukayakay tu buyu' caay kadyum a malaheci, taneng palawad han tu tusa tulu a demiad i piidangan mipili' tu ngatu a muculil. (El Circuito / The Paine Circuit), . satim piliwkuan aku tu saayaway a ngatu i A-ken-tinyadah ku kaetel tu demiad, palawpes tju demiad a mizunbay tayza i Nan-ci atu amalimad tayza i Nan-ciay a balunga, sazikuzay mapacici' taneng makay capiay a niyazu' Puerto Natales dada' milihiza cacay a demiad a sakaput tayza. uyni u tanengay tu kasatimad, mumul tu sananal maudad. hemhem ku balucu' aku mikacaw tu papiliwkuay a basu, sayawan a pikacawan pakulisiw ku uzip miazih tu likutay nu aaidangan nu tahakay a buhang Cueva del Milodon "Milodon Cave", namaazih ku malecaday angangan nika u malawpesay tu a ukak nu aadupan, zikuz tatenga tu micumud tu liwliw nu aidangan. Pay-ne kanatal aidangan tatenga' masuped tu ku tahakay a hanhan, ihm picumuda capi tu pipasasumaad malikeluh ku May-cow a tow ayam "√Īand√ļ / rhea", sizi-tow "guanaco" abu kuyu "grey fox" buyu'ay aadupan atu pinaay lamangan nu buyu'ay a ayam. (√Īand√ļ / rhea), . Ce-li Pay-ne kanatal aidangan, u singanganay nu kitakit katayzaan nu mukayakayay tu buyu', katuud ku misasingay caay kapiculil, cacay a tatukian muculil yadah tu ku nisasingan tu aazihan, muneng I kanatal aidangan, caay pikuwan apina a tatukian ku pisasing. 11 a bulad katukuh zuma a mihcaan tu 3 a bulad, u piliwkuwn, tanayu' ku demiad apuyu' ku sandeb, tabaki ku bali, pilabinan atumicaliw tu kazizeng caay kadayum amitin sangaleb u Pay-ney" kanihalan atu kacelemad a tatukian tanayu', patineku tu 12 abulad tusazikuzay kanihalan tu 05:30, kaceleman tu 22:10, tulu a bulad malingatu, 4-5 a bulad tu balangbangan, yadah ku sumanahay a papah. 6-8 a bulad, katukuh9 a bulad tuteban nu kasienawan, huntu adidi' ku bali, madayum masasing ku mabelihay a adingu, izaw henay ku tabakiay a sakapahay, mautang ku kanihal, matabal mucelem, sisa lihalay mkisasing, mahiniay 6 a bulad tahlkal ku cilal tu 09:50 a tatukian, kaceleman tu 17:50 a tatukian mamin tu misasing tu kanihalal kapah tu taluwkang malahuk, namamim malakuh mihibang katukuh tulu sepap a tatukian tahkal misasing tu kacelemad, mamin misasing tu kacelemad kapah tu taluma' malabi. 9 a bulad malingatu, 10 a bulad, 11 a b ulad katukuh 12 a bulad tu teban u sadingsingan a puu',kinapina tu tayza i Patagonia pasasing, makay 8 a bulad katukuh 6 a bulad natayza tu amin, caay nay katayza i 7 a bulad, pay puu'an izaw ku kasamicidekay. pasabalucu' muenengay i kanatal aidangan, anucaay likut nu kanatal aidanganay aVilla Serrano, anuangangan u nipasasing hawsa, amana pipili' muneng i Puerto Natales, zayhan sademiad a izaw ku pananukasay tu setat a tatukian nu saculilan. Mjuneng I kanatal aida ngan kanca a izaw ku saculian a kazizeng, caay kakatuud ku micaliw tu kazizeng,katuud ku mibaway tu kazizeng, nayi' ku kazizeng ahicaen muculil. micumud tu aidangan ayaw amicunus tu kapahay a nanum /hica, zayhan labu nu aidangan nayay ku pacakayay tu tuud,matekes ku nanum, Patagonia maacak, amaydih kisu tu nanum. Pay-neykanatal aidangn u sasasingan mitaliyuk tu kalimucu' nu Pay-ney,tabakiay a Pay-ney buyu' atu Pay-ney tulu a ta, patatungus tu masazumaay pasasing tu aazihan, demidemiad mizunbay amin tu zumaay kitizaan tu kanihalan atu kacelemad. Pay-ney a nisasingan hicaen amatineng tu kanihalan atu kaceleman? tada madayum, anu u likat makay Kawana takawili, u sananal kuyza, anu kawili pasayza i kawanan, u kaceleman kuyza. zayhan misasing tu kalimucu' nu Pay-ney, tabakiay Pay-ney a kalimucu' hatu u makayza i timul pasaamis, sisa sananalay a likat makay kawanan takawili, Pay-ney san-ta sangaleb kapah akatinengan tu, maydih maazih ku kapahay a Pay-ney san-ta kanca makay wali tasatip, anu izaw ku cilal madil ku sumanaay madil ku takuliyaway, kanca u kanihalan, zayhan kaceleman macubelis ku lkikat , mala nisaitan a adingu.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == paj-n…ô kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan "si-paŇč-ja a kamu, "par*u…ô na ¶ionar~…ĺ torr…ôs d…ôr~…ĺ pain…ô Ē~ ° u imi ¶in-ta aidaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ "pain…ô" ¶usur~…ĺit makaj in-ti-an a kamu "sumir~…ĺawaj a imi, ńßamin u kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan masaijuk nu sumir~…ĺawaj mar~…ĺiŇčaŇčuaj dińß…ôb kur~…ĺi a sauwas ¶ a siŇčaŇčan. :par*u…ô na ¶ionar~…ĺ torr…ôs d…ôr~…ĺ pain…ô)*********,"pain…ô" . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tini i nutimur~…ĺan nu ¶-r~…ĺi ¶a ¶aj nu kanar~…ĺar~…ĺaj aidaŇčan, r~…ĺar~…ĺabu mi ¶api tu an-s-san atu timur~…ĺ taj-pin-jaŇč atu sikur~…ĺiaj a baju, kikasumad ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us nu d…ômiad, kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan aŇčaŇčan a adińßan izaw ku paj-n…ô-ta "r~…ĺas torr…ôs", paj-n…ô kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° "r~…ĺos ¶u…ôrnos" ńßwa-kow-ku "*ar~…ĺr~…ĺ…ô fran ¶*s", now-t…ôn-s…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô kur~…ĺi a taku "r~…ĺano nord…ônskj*r~…ĺd" atu tan…ôŇč maazińß ku kur~…ĺi a bju Ē~ ° nu abu taku * abu kur~…ĺi a sauwa ¶ "r~…ĺago gr…ô & gr~…ĺa ¶i…ôr gr…ô" imańßini u maj- ¶…ô-r~…ĺun- ¶…ô-r~…ĺi tinur~…ĺaj ¶ud…ôtaj a kitizaan ku mikuwanaj, *** kuŇč-r~…ĺi ku r~…ĺa…ôd tu na-ta-r~…ĺaj-s a minatu, patiz…ôŇč i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ *,*** pin-ńßwŇč-kuŇč-r~…ĺi. :***(r~…ĺas torr…ôs),***(r~…ĺos ¶u…ôrnos),***(*ar~…ĺr~…ĺ…ô fran ¶*s),********(r~…ĺago nord…ônskj*r~…ĺd) . mir~…ĺ…ôkakawa ku nan-m…ô- ¶ow mikinsa tu nisur~…ĺitan a ŇčaŇčan ńßawsa "paj-n…ô-j…ô kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan" "par*u…ô na ¶ionar~…ĺ torr…ôs d…ôr~…ĺ pain…ô" r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa tańßkar~…ĺ i nuajawan nu maku, anu ¶aaj kinsa…ôn sa kar~…ĺijuńßan, kins ńßan sa katawidan azińß ńßan sanu paj-n…ô aidaŇčan nu siŇčaŇčanaj nu nan-m…ô- ¶ow, sar~…ĺuŇčan ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ u kapańßaj a pi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. "(par*u…ô na ¶ionar~…ĺ torr…ôs d…ôr~…ĺ pain…ô) . pajmińß ¶aan masur~…ĺup ku mar~…ĺ…ôbut …ômaŇč ku manamuńßaj tu nu tańßakaj a pir~…ĺiwkuaj tajni. mi ¶id…ôk ku manamuńßaj mukajakaj tu buju Ē~ ° sakaj ow-m…ô a tad…ômaw ńßawsa, sakamu sa ku paj-n…ô i kauzipan kan ¶a a kina ¶a ¶aj tajni mizizaw u kanamuńßan nu mi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj kujni a zazan. anu "t…ôn-koŇč- ¶- ¶in" "u-ju-ni" ja- ¶ow a tad…ômaw tajza i nan-m…ô kan ¶a u pizunbajan a katajzan. ujza "paj-n…ô kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan" ujza nu mir~…ĺiwkuaj nu ow-m…ô kan ¶a u pizunbanaj a piidaŇčan . ujni nisur~…ĺitan amisiwkaj tuu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu paj-n…ô miazińß saajawaj mi ¶uzuńß tu paj-n…ô kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan atu bu-ńß…ô- ¶j…ô kanatar~…ĺ. paj-n…ô kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan ujza mańßi ¶a u pir~…ĺiwkuan nu tad…ômaw a n a kakitiza pisiŇčkiwan ńßina kakitizaan u sakatur~…ĺuaj a pir~…ĺiwkuan nu nan-m…ô, a ¶aaj piar~…ĺ…ôs kaku mir~…ĺiwku tu paj-n…ô kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan. u dumiad ku ńßan, maar~…ĺ…ôsajtu mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tuja mi ¶id…ôkaj nu mitar~…ĺijukaj mukajakaj tu buju Ē~ ° a zazan "…ôr~…ĺ ¶ir ¶uito / tńß…ô pain…ô ¶ir ¶uit" tuwa ¶a kinapina a panukas, nipaŇčaŇčan "w" a zazan mukajakaj tu buju Ē~ ° ¶aaj kadjum a mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, tan…ôŇč par~…ĺawad ńßan tu tusa tur~…ĺu a d…ômiad i piidaŇčan mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu Ňčatu a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. (…ôr~…ĺ ¶ir ¶uito / tńß…ô pain…ô ¶ir ¶uit), . satim pir~…ĺiwkuan aku tu saajawaj a Ňčatu i a-k…ôn-tinjadańß ku ka…ôt…ôr~…ĺ tu d…ômiad, par~…ĺawp…ôs tju d…ômiad a mizunbaj tajza i nan- ¶i atu amar~…ĺimad tajza i nan- ¶iaj a bar~…ĺuŇča, sazikuzaj mapa ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° tan…ôŇč makaj ¶apiaj a nijazu Ē~ ° pu…ôrto natar~…ĺ…ôs dada Ē~ ° mir~…ĺińßiza ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad a sakaput tajza. ujni u tan…ôŇčaj tu kasatimad, mumur~…ĺ tu sananar~…ĺ maudad. ńß…ômńß…ôm ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° aku mika ¶aw tu papir~…ĺiwkuaj a basu, sajawan a pika ¶awan pakur~…ĺisiw ku uzip miazińß tu r~…ĺikutaj nu aaidaŇčan nu tańßakaj a buńßaŇč ¶u…ô*a d…ôr~…ĺ mir~…ĺodon "mir~…ĺodon ¶a*…ô", namaazińß ku mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj aŇčaŇčan nika u mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj tu a ukak nu aadupan, zikuz tat…ôŇča tu mi ¶umud tu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu aidaŇčan. paj-n…ô kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° masup…ôd tu ku tańßakaj a ńßanńßan, ińßm pi ¶umuda ¶api tu pipasasumaad mar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß ku maj- ¶ow a tow ajam "*and* / rńß…ôa", sizi-tow "guana ¶o" abu kuju "gr…ô fo*" buju Ē~ °aj aadupan atu pinaaj r~…ĺamaŇčan nu buju Ē~ °aj a ajam. (*and* / rńß…ôa), . ¶…ô-r~…ĺi paj-n…ô kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan, u siŇčaŇčanaj nu kitakit katajzaan nu mukajakajaj tu buju Ē~ °, katuud ku misasiŇčaj ¶aaj kapi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ¶a ¶aj a tatukian mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ jadańß tu ku nisasiŇčan tu aazińßan, mun…ôŇč i kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan, ¶aaj pikuwan apina a tatukian ku pisasiŇč. ** a bur~…ĺad katukuńß zuma a mińß ¶aan tu * a bur~…ĺad, u pir~…ĺiwkuwn, tanaju Ē~ ° ku d…ômiad apuju Ē~ ° ku sand…ôb, tabaki ku bar~…ĺi, pir~…ĺabinan atumi ¶ar~…ĺiw tu kaziz…ôŇč ¶aaj kadajum amitin saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb u paj-n…ô" kanińßar~…ĺan atu ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ômad a tatukian tanaju Ē~ °, patin…ôku tu ** abur~…ĺad tusazikuzaj kanińßar~…ĺan tu **:**, ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôman tu **:**, tur~…ĺu a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu, *-* a bur~…ĺad tu bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan, jadańß ku sumanańßaj a papańß. *-* a bur~…ĺad, katukuńß* a bur~…ĺad tut…ôban nu kasi…ônawan, ńßuntu adidi Ē~ ° ku bar~…ĺi, madajum masasiŇč ku mab…ôr~…ĺińßaj a adiŇču, izaw ńß…ônaj ku tabakiaj a sakapańßaj, mautaŇč ku kanińßar~…ĺ, matabar~…ĺ mu ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôm, sisa r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj mkisasiŇč, mańßiniaj * a bur~…ĺad tańßr~…ĺkar~…ĺ ku ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ tu **:** a tatukian, ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôman tu **:** a tatukian mamin tu misasiŇč tu kanińßar~…ĺar~…ĺ kapańß tu tar~…ĺuwkaŇč mar~…ĺańßuk, namamim mar~…ĺakuńß mińßibaŇč katukuńß tur~…ĺu s…ôpap a tatukian tańßkar~…ĺ misasiŇč tu ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ômad, mamin misasiŇč tu ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ômad kapańß tu tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mar~…ĺabi. * a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu, ** a bur~…ĺad, ** a b ur~…ĺad katukuńß ** a bur~…ĺad tu t…ôban u sadiŇčsiŇčan a puu Ē~ °,kinapina tu tajza i patagonia pasasiŇč, makaj * a bur~…ĺad katukuńß * a bur~…ĺad natajza tu amin, ¶aaj naj katajza i * a bur~…ĺad, paj puu Ē~ °an izaw ku kasami ¶id…ôkaj. pasabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan, anu ¶aaj r~…ĺikut nu kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčanaj a*ir~…ĺr~…ĺa s…ôrrano, anuaŇčaŇčan u nipasasiŇč ńßawsa, amana pipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mun…ôŇč i pu…ôrto natar~…ĺ…ôs, zajńßan sad…ômiad a izaw ku pananukasaj tu s…ôtat a tatukian nu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. mjun…ôŇč i kanatar~…ĺ aida Ňčan kan ¶a a izaw ku sa ¶ur~…ĺian a kaziz…ôŇč, ¶aaj kakatuud ku mi ¶ar~…ĺiw tu kaziz…ôŇč,katuud ku mibawaj tu kaziz…ôŇč, naji Ē~ ° ku kaziz…ôŇč ańßi ¶a…ôn mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. mi ¶umud tu aidaŇčan ajaw ami ¶unus tu kapańßaj a nanum /ńßi ¶a, zajńßan r~…ĺabu nu aidaŇčan najaj ku pa ¶akajaj tu tuud,mat…ôk…ôs ku nanum, patagonia maa ¶ak, amajdińß kisu tu nanum. paj-n…ôkanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčn u sasasiŇčan mitar~…ĺijuk tu kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° nu paj-n…ô,tabakiaj a paj-n…ô buju Ē~ ° atu paj-n…ô tur~…ĺu a ta, patatuŇčus tu masazumaaj pasasiŇč tu aazińßan, d…ômid…ômiad mizunbaj amin tu zumaaj kitizaan tu kanińßar~…ĺan atu ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ômad. paj-n…ô a nisasiŇčan ńßi ¶a…ôn amatin…ôŇč tu kanińßar~…ĺan atu ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôman? tada madajum, anu u r~…ĺikat makaj kawana takawir~…ĺi, u sananar~…ĺ kujza, anu kawir~…ĺi pasajza i kawanan, u ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôman kujza. zajńßan misasiŇč tu kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° nu paj-n…ô, tabakiaj paj-n…ô a kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° ńßatu u makajza i timur~…ĺ pasaamis, sisa sananar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺikat makaj kawanan takawir~…ĺi, paj-n…ô san-ta saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb kapańß akatin…ôŇčan tu, majdińß maazińß ku kapańßaj a paj-n…ô san-ta kan ¶a makaj war~…ĺi tasatip, anu izaw ku ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ madir~…ĺ ku sumanaaj madir~…ĺ ku takur~…ĺijawaj, kan ¶a u kanińßar~…ĺan, zajńßan ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôman ma ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis ku r~…ĺkikat , mar~…ĺa nisaitan a adiŇču.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Pay-ney kanatal aidangan "Si-pang-ya a kamu, "Parque Nacional Torres del Paine' u imi Cin-ta aidangan nu kanatal "Paine" cusulit makay In-ti-an a kamu "sumilaway a imi, hamin u kanatal aidangan masaiyuk nu sumilaway malinganguay diheb kuli a sauwasc a singangan. :Parque Nacional Torres del Paine)ŚŹąŤ≠ĮÁāļťĚíŚ°ĒŚúčŚģ∂ŚÖ¨Śúí,"Paine" . nilaculan tini i nutimulan nu C-li cacay nu kanalalay aidangan, lalabu micapi tu An-s-san atu timul Tay-pin-yang atu sikuliay a bayu, kikasumad ku la'cus nu demiad, kanatal aidangan angangan a adihan izaw ku Pay-ney-ta "Las Torres", Pay-ney kalimucu' "Los Cuernos" Hwa-kow-ku "Valle Franc√©s", Now-ten-se-al-te kuli a taku "Lano Nordenskj√∂ld" atu taneng maazih ku kuli a byu' nu abu taku ÔľÜ abu kuli a sauwac "Lago Grey & Glacier Grey" imahini u May-ce-lun-Ce-li tinulay cudetay a kitizaan ku mikuwanay, 112 kung-li ku laed tu Na-ta-lay-s a minatu, patizeng i 1959 a mihca 5 a bulad 13 a demiad, u hekal 2,422 pin-hwng-kung-li. :ÁôĺŚÖßŚ°Ē(Las Torres),ÁôĺŚÖßŤßí(Los Cuernos),ś≥ēŚúčŤį∑(Valle Franc√©s),ŤęĺÁôĽść®ÁąĺŚĺ∑ŚÜįŚ∑ĚśĻĖ(Lago Nordenskj√∂ld) . milekakawa ku Nan-mey-cow mikinsa tu nisulitan a ngangan hawsa "Pay-ney-ye kanatal aidangan" "Parque Nacional Torres del Paine" lalid sa tahkal i nuayawan nu maku, anu caay kinsaen sa kaliyuhan, kins han sa katawidan azih han sanu Pay-ney aidangan nu singanganay nu Nan-mey-cow, salungan ku hekal u kapahay a piculilan. "(Parque Nacional Torres del Paine) . paymihcaan masulup ku malebut emang ku manamuhay tu nu tahakay a piliwkuay tayni. micidek ku manamuhay mukayakay tu buyu' sakay Ow-mey a tademaw hawsa, sakamu sa ku Pay-ne i kauzipan kanca a kinacacay tayni mizizaw u kanamuhan nu miculilay kuyni a zazan. anu "ten-kong-c-cin" "u-yu-ni" Ya-cow a tademaw tayza i Nan-mey kanca u pizunbayan a katayzan. uyza "Pay-ney kanatal aidangan" uyza nu miliwkuay nu Ow-mey kanca u pizunbanay a piidangan . uyni nisulitan amisiwkay tuu liwliw nu Pay-ney kanatal aidangan, hicaen mizunbay tu cacililan atu pilaminan. atu tayza i kanatal aidangan a saculilan atu labu singanganay aazihan nu Pay-ney kanatal aidangan sibalucu' a paazih tu kawaw nu Pay-ney kanatal aidangan. zayhan tayza Pay-ne kanatal aidangan cacay a demiad malikeluh ku balad maluyuh tu ku sangaw nupades, sisa sazikuzay nayi' ku malaheciay a Pay-ney kanatal aidanganay "W" piculilan a zazan, tayza dada' Pay-ne kanatal aidangan satipanay a "Ke-iye kuli a sauwac i capi misaculiculil. zuma mipangangan tu Pay-ne kanatal aidanganay a Day Tour makalikut mikinaul tu hekal nu Pay-ne kanatal aidanganay. Ce-li in-in apiaziha, u sakaydihan aku miazih saayaway micuzuh tu Pay-ne kanatal aidangan atu bu-he-cye kanatal. Pay-ne kanatal aidangan uyza mahica u piliwkuan nu tademaw a N a kakitiza pisingkiwan hina singanganay. kanahatu miliwku amana paceba sat u nipisingkiw tu tau, nika tadeng makazebec a katuud ku micukelay, tatenga' kikatinengan ku tau. Nutimilan nu Nan-bey Patagonia kakitizaan u sakatuluay a piliwkuan nu Nan-mey, acaay piales kaku miliwku tu Pay-ne kanatal aidangan. u dumiad ku han, maalesaytu muculil tuya micidekay nu mitaliyukay mukayakay tu buyu' a zazan "El Circuito / The Paine Circuit" tuwaca kinapina a panukas, nipangangan "W" a zazan mukayakay tu buyu' caay kadyum a malaheci, taneng palawad han tu tusa tulu a demiad i piidangan mipili' tu ngatu a muculil. (El Circuito / The Paine Circuit), . satim piliwkuan aku tu saayaway a ngatu i A-ken-tinyadah ku kaetel tu demiad, palawpes tju demiad a mizunbay tayza i Nan-ci atu amalimad tayza i Nan-ciay a balunga, sazikuzay mapacici' taneng makay capiay a niyazu' Puerto Natales dada' milihiza cacay a demiad a sakaput tayza. uyni u tanengay tu kasatimad, mumul tu sananal maudad. hemhem ku balucu' aku mikacaw tu papiliwkuay a basu, sayawan a pikacawan pakulisiw ku uzip miazih tu likutay nu aaidangan nu tahakay a buhang Cueva del Milodon "Milodon Cave", namaazih ku malecaday angangan nika u malawpesay tu a ukak nu aadupan, zikuz tatenga tu micumud tu liwliw nu aidangan. Pay-ne kanatal aidangan tatenga' masuped tu ku tahakay a hanhan, ihm picumuda capi tu pipasasumaad malikeluh ku May-cow a tow ayam "√Īand√ļ / rhea", sizi-tow "guanaco" abu kuyu "grey fox" buyu'ay aadupan atu pinaay lamangan nu buyu'ay a ayam. (√Īand√ļ / rhea), . Ce-li Pay-ne kanatal aidangan, u singanganay nu kitakit katayzaan nu mukayakayay tu buyu', katuud ku misasingay caay kapiculil, cacay a tatukian muculil yadah tu ku nisasingan tu aazihan, muneng I kanatal aidangan, caay pikuwan apina a tatukian ku pisasing. 11 a bulad katukuh zuma a mihcaan tu 3 a bulad, u piliwkuwn, tanayu' ku demiad apuyu' ku sandeb, tabaki ku bali, pilabinan atumicaliw tu kazizeng caay kadayum amitin sangaleb u Pay-ney" kanihalan atu kacelemad a tatukian tanayu', patineku tu 12 abulad tusazikuzay kanihalan tu 05:30, kaceleman tu 22:10, tulu a bulad malingatu, 4-5 a bulad tu balangbangan, yadah ku sumanahay a papah. 6-8 a bulad, katukuh9 a bulad tuteban nu kasienawan, huntu adidi' ku bali, madayum masasing ku mabelihay a adingu, izaw henay ku tabakiay a sakapahay, mautang ku kanihal, matabal mucelem, sisa lihalay mkisasing, mahiniay 6 a bulad tahlkal ku cilal tu 09:50 a tatukian, kaceleman tu 17:50 a tatukian mamin tu misasing tu kanihalal kapah tu taluwkang malahuk, namamim malakuh mihibang katukuh tulu sepap a tatukian tahkal misasing tu kacelemad, mamin misasing tu kacelemad kapah tu taluma' malabi. 9 a bulad malingatu, 10 a bulad, 11 a b ulad katukuh 12 a bulad tu teban u sadingsingan a puu',kinapina tu tayza i Patagonia pasasing, makay 8 a bulad katukuh 6 a bulad natayza tu amin, caay nay katayza i 7 a bulad, pay puu'an izaw ku kasamicidekay. pasabalucu' muenengay i kanatal aidangan, anucaay likut nu kanatal aidanganay aVilla Serrano, anuangangan u nipasasing hawsa, amana pipili' muneng i Puerto Natales, zayhan sademiad a izaw ku pananukasay tu setat a tatukian nu saculilan. Mjuneng I kanatal aida ngan kanca a izaw ku saculian a kazizeng, caay kakatuud ku micaliw tu kazizeng,katuud ku mibaway tu kazizeng, nayi' ku kazizeng ahicaen muculil. micumud tu aidangan ayaw amicunus tu kapahay a nanum /hica, zayhan labu nu aidangan nayay ku pacakayay tu tuud,matekes ku nanum, Patagonia maacak, amaydih kisu tu nanum. Pay-neykanatal aidangn u sasasingan mitaliyuk tu kalimucu' nu Pay-ney,tabakiay a Pay-ney buyu' atu Pay-ney tulu a ta, patatungus tu masazumaay pasasing tu aazihan, demidemiad mizunbay amin tu zumaay kitizaan tu kanihalan atu kacelemad. Pay-ney a nisasingan hicaen amatineng tu kanihalan atu kaceleman? tada madayum, anu u likat makay Kawana takawili, u sananal kuyza, anu kawili pasayza i kawanan, u kaceleman kuyza. zayhan misasing tu kalimucu' nu Pay-ney, tabakiay Pay-ney a kalimucu' hatu u makayza i timul pasaamis, sisa sananalay a likat makay kawanan takawili, Pay-ney san-ta sangaleb kapah akatinengan tu, maydih maazih ku kapahay a Pay-ney san-ta kanca makay wali tasatip, anu izaw ku cilal madil ku sumanaay madil ku takuliyaway, kanca u kanihalan, zayhan kaceleman macubelis ku lkikat , mala nisaitan a adingu.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == paj-n…ô kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan "si-paŇč-ja a kamu, "par*u…ô na ¶ionar~…ĺ torr…ôs d…ôr~…ĺ pain…ô Ē~ ° u imi ¶in-ta aidaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ "pain…ô" ¶usur~…ĺit makaj in-ti-an a kamu "sumir~…ĺawaj a imi, ńßamin u kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan masaijuk nu sumir~…ĺawaj mar~…ĺiŇčaŇčuaj dińß…ôb kur~…ĺi a sauwas ¶ a siŇčaŇčan. :par*u…ô na ¶ionar~…ĺ torr…ôs d…ôr~…ĺ pain…ô)*********,"pain…ô" . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tini i nutimur~…ĺan nu ¶-r~…ĺi ¶a ¶aj nu kanar~…ĺar~…ĺaj aidaŇčan, r~…ĺar~…ĺabu mi ¶api tu an-s-san atu timur~…ĺ taj-pin-jaŇč atu sikur~…ĺiaj a baju, kikasumad ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us nu d…ômiad, kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan aŇčaŇčan a adińßan izaw ku paj-n…ô-ta "r~…ĺas torr…ôs", paj-n…ô kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° "r~…ĺos ¶u…ôrnos" ńßwa-kow-ku "*ar~…ĺr~…ĺ…ô fran ¶*s", now-t…ôn-s…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô kur~…ĺi a taku "r~…ĺano nord…ônskj*r~…ĺd" atu tan…ôŇč maazińß ku kur~…ĺi a bju Ē~ ° nu abu taku * abu kur~…ĺi a sauwa ¶ "r~…ĺago gr…ô & gr~…ĺa ¶i…ôr gr…ô" imańßini u maj- ¶…ô-r~…ĺun- ¶…ô-r~…ĺi tinur~…ĺaj ¶ud…ôtaj a kitizaan ku mikuwanaj, *** kuŇč-r~…ĺi ku r~…ĺa…ôd tu na-ta-r~…ĺaj-s a minatu, patiz…ôŇč i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ *,*** pin-ńßwŇč-kuŇč-r~…ĺi. :***(r~…ĺas torr…ôs),***(r~…ĺos ¶u…ôrnos),***(*ar~…ĺr~…ĺ…ô fran ¶*s),********(r~…ĺago nord…ônskj*r~…ĺd) . mir~…ĺ…ôkakawa ku nan-m…ô- ¶ow mikinsa tu nisur~…ĺitan a ŇčaŇčan ńßawsa "paj-n…ô-j…ô kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan" "par*u…ô na ¶ionar~…ĺ torr…ôs d…ôr~…ĺ pain…ô" r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa tańßkar~…ĺ i nuajawan nu maku, anu ¶aaj kinsa…ôn sa kar~…ĺijuńßan, kins ńßan sa katawidan azińß ńßan sanu paj-n…ô aidaŇčan nu siŇčaŇčanaj nu nan-m…ô- ¶ow, sar~…ĺuŇčan ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ u kapańßaj a pi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. tu tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mar~…ĺabi. * a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu, ** a bur~…ĺad, ** a b ur~…ĺad katukuńß ** a bur~…ĺad tu t…ôban u sadiŇčsiŇčan a puu Ē~ °,kinapina tu tajza i patagonia pasasiŇč, makaj * a kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčanaj a*ir~…ĺr~…ĺa s…ôrrano, anuaŇčaŇčan u nipasasiŇč ńßawsa, amana pipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mun…ôŇč i pu…ôrto natar~…ĺ…ôs, zajńßan sad…ômiad a izaw ku pananukasaj tu s…ôtat a tatukian nu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. mjun…ôŇč i kanatar~…ĺ aida Ňčan kan ¶a a izaw ku sa ¶ur~…ĺian a kaziz…ôŇč, ¶aaj kakatuud ku mi ¶ar~…ĺiw tu kaziz…ôŇč,katuud ku mibawaj tu kaziz…ôŇč, naji Ē~ ° ku kaziz…ôŇč ańßi ¶a…ôn mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. mi ¶umud tu aidaŇčan ajaw ami ¶unus tu kapańßaj a nanum /ńßi ¶a, zajńßan r~…ĺabu nu aidaŇčan najaj ku pa ¶akajaj tu tuud,mat…ôk…ôs ku nanum, patagonia maa ¶ak, amajdińß kisu tu nanum. paj-n…ôkanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčn u sasasiŇčan mitar~…ĺijuk tu kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° nu paj-n…ô,tabakiaj a paj-n…ô buju Ē~ ° atu paj-n…ô tur~…ĺu a ta, patatuŇčus tu masazumaaj pasasiŇč tu aazińßan, d…ômid…ômiad mizunbaj amin tu zumaaj kitizaan tu kanińßar~…ĺan atu ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ômad. paj-n…ô a nisasiŇčan ńßi ¶a…ôn amatin…ôŇč tu kanińßar~…ĺan atu ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôman? tada madajum, anu u r~…ĺikat makaj kawana takawir~…ĺi, u sananar~…ĺ kujza, anu kawir~…ĺi pasajza i kawanan, u ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôman kujza. zajńßan misasiŇč tu kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° nu paj-n…ô, tabakiaj paj-n…ô a kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° ńßatu u makajza i timur~…ĺ pasaamis, sisa sananar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺikat makaj kawanan takawir~…ĺi, paj-n…ô san-ta saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb kapańß akatin…ôŇčan tu, majdińß maazińß ku kapańßaj a paj-n…ô san-ta kan ¶a makaj war~…ĺi tasatip, anu izaw ku ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ madir~…ĺ ku sumanaaj madir~…ĺ ku takur~…ĺijawaj, kan ¶a u kanińßar~…ĺan, zajńßan ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôman ma ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis ku r~…ĺkikat , mar~…ĺa nisaitan a adiŇču.
